BROODMOTHER-BUG_SWARM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times. 
ALL insects heal 1.
BROODMOTHER-BUG_SWARM.title: Bug Swarm
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_RAZORWASP.title: Razorwasp
BROODMOTHER-BLIGHTED_GUARD.title: Blighted Guard
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_BLIGHTFLY.title: Blightfly
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_WASP_NEST.title: Wasp Nest
BROODMOTHER-HURL_HIVE.title: Hurl Hive
BROODMOTHER-STRIKE_BROODMOTHER.title: Strike
BROODMOTHER-DEFEND_BROODMOTHER.title: Defend
BROODMOTHER-BUG_SHIELD.title: Bug Shield
BROODMOTHER-MOLT.description:
If this is the first card you play this turn, lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn. 
Otherwise gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-MOLT.title: Molt
BROODMOTHER-METAMORPHIC_STRIKE.title: Metamorphic Strike
BROODMOTHER-METAMORPHIC_DEFEND.title: Metamorphic Defend
BROODMOTHER-COCOON.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Choose 2 cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. The first gains [gold]Shift[/gold], paired with the second. The second is removed from combat.
BROODMOTHER-COCOON.title: Cocoon
BROODMOTHER-INVIGORATING_SLASH.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
BROODMOTHER-INVIGORATING_SLASH.title: Invigorating Slash
BROODMOTHER-INFEST.title: Infest
BROODMOTHER-WILD_STING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times. 
Add a [gold]Razorwasp[/gold] to your hand.
BROODMOTHER-WILD_STING.title: Wild Sting
BROODMOTHER-ENCOURAGEMENT.description: At the start of your turn, gain {EncouragementPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each insect alive.
BROODMOTHER-ENCOURAGEMENT.title: Encouragement
BROODMOTHER-EMERGENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If this is the first card you play this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Otherwise draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
BROODMOTHER-EMERGENCE.title: Emergence
BROODMOTHER-HIVE_MIND.description: Trigger the passive of a random insect.
BROODMOTHER-HIVE_MIND.title: Hive Mind
BROODMOTHER-INSTAR.title: Instar
BROODMOTHER-WILLING_SACRIFICE.descriptio: Apply [gold]Sacrifice[/gold] to one of your insects.
BROODMOTHER-WILLING_SACRIFICE.title: Willing Sacrifice
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_SCARAB_BEETLE.title: Scarab Beetle
BROODMOTHER-BLIGHT.title: Blight
BROODMOTHER-KHEPRIS_ASSURANCE.descriptio:
Shuffle your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw cards until your hand is full. 
Add a [gold]Scarab Beetle[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-KHEPRIS_ASSURANCE.title: Khepri's Assurance
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_DAWN_BEETLE.title: Dawn Beetle
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_PLAGUEFLY.title: Plaguefly
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_SNAREFLY.title: Snarefly
BROODMOTHER-FESTERING_FORM.description:
Whenever an enemy takes unblocked damage, increase their [gold]Infestation[/gold] by {InfestationMultiplier}%. 
If they have no [gold]Infestation[/gold], apply 1.
BROODMOTHER-FESTERING_FORM.title: Festering Form
BROODMOTHER-SWARM_SACRIFICE.title: Swarm Sacrifice
BROODMOTHER-EULOGY.description: Whenever any of your insects dies, draw 1 card
BROODMOTHER-EULOGY.title: Eulogy
BROODMOTHER-RELEASE_DRONEWASP.title: Dronewasp
BROODMOTHER-RECLAMATION.description:
Move {CardAmount:diff()} {CardAmount:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Draw {DrawAmount:diff()} cards.
BROODMOTHER-RECLAMATION.title: Reclamation
BROODMOTHER-RECLAMATION.selectionScreenP: Choose {CardAmount:plural:a card|{} cards} to send to your Discard Pile.
BROODMOTHER-NIP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Increase the damage of [gold]Gnash[/gold] by {GnashAmount:diff()}.
BROODMOTHER-NIP.title: Nip
BROODMOTHER-GNASH.title: Gnash
BROODMOTHER-PROLIFERATE.title: Proliferate
BROODMOTHER-HONEYCOMB.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Apply [gold]Sticky {StickyAmount}[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-HONEYCOMB.title: Honeycomb
BROODMOTHER-CANNIBALIZE.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Harvest|Kill} ALL insects. 
Draw {Cards:diff()} and gain {Energy:diff} for each insect.
BROODMOTHER-CANNIBALIZE.title: Cannibalize
BROODMOTHER-TEND.title: Tend
BROODMOTHER-BURROWING_BITE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Put up to {Cards:plural:a card|{} cards} on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-BURROWING_BITE.title: Burrowing Bite
BROODMOTHER-BURROWING_BITE.selectionScre: Choose {Cards:plural:a card|{} cards} to put on top of your Draw Pile.
BROODMOTHER-VENOM_BITE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If the enemy has [gold]Infestation[/gold], apply {InfestationAmount:diff()} more [gold]Infestation[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-VENOM_BITE.title: Venom Bite
BROODMOTHER-RAPID_BITE.title: Rapid Bite
BROODMOTHER-MOMENTUM.title: Momentum
BROODMOTHER-HIVE_CALL.description: Add a random living insect card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-HIVE_CALL.title: Hive's Call
BROODMOTHER-BRISTLE.title: Bristle
BROODMOTHER-HARDENED_SHELL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
If you have [gold]Vigor[/gold] gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] again.
BROODMOTHER-HARDENED_SHELL.title: Hardened Shell
BROODMOTHER-INFECTED_WOUND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Apply [gold]Infestation[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
BROODMOTHER-INFECTED_WOUND.title: Infected Wound
BROODMOTHER-TOXIC_BLOOD.title: Toxic Blood
BROODMOTHER-POLLINATED_BITE.title: Pollinated Bite
BROODMOTHER-MOB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If you have at least 2 living insects, deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
BROODMOTHER-MOB.title: Mob
BROODMOTHER-INTIMIDATE.title: Intimidate
BROODMOTHER-COVER.title: Cover
BROODMOTHER-SHED_SKIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Draw {Cards:plural:a card|{} cards}. 
Gain {Thorns:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
BROODMOTHER-SHED_SKIN.title: Shed Skin
BROODMOTHER-GNAW.title: Gnaw
BROODMOTHER-DEBILITATING_STING.title: Debilitating Sting
BROODMOTHER-ASSAULT.title: Assault
BROODMOTHER-BROOD.description: Next turn, add {Cards:plural:a [gold]Dronewasp[/gold]|{} [gold]Dronewasps[/gold]} to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
BROODMOTHER-BROOD.title: Brood
BROODMOTHER-LARVA_ENERGY.title: Larva
BROODMOTHER-LARVA_CARD.title: Larva
